title: Record hard86, recompact 1.5%, speculative 2k
prompt: Create reports/hard86-recompact15-spec2k.md with sections for Hard 86, Recompact 1.5, Spec 2k, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Hard86 Recompact15 Spec2k Contract

## Hard 86
full compaction hard block defaults to 0.86 so long sessions stop earlier near the window while still leaving summary room

## Recompact 1.5
full compaction min recompact growth defaults to 1.5% so long sessions can reclaim again sooner after a compact

## Spec 2k
speculative pre-turn buffer defaults to 2k tokens for earlier preemptive compact without over-triggering

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy vitest
